assertions.title: A key-auth host can be saved only with a valid linked identity

steps.action: Run the app-scoped connected Android tests on emulator-5554 with HostLibraryFlowsInstrumentedTest and IdentityPasswordFlowsInstrumentedTest filtered in
steps.expected: The assigned host and identity flows execute against the real Android surface and produce fresh connected-test artifacts
steps.observed: The filtered :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest run completed successfully with 28/28 tests passing on atermApi35(AVD) - 15.

steps.action: Review HostLibraryFlowsInstrumentedTest.key_auth_host_can_be_saved_and_reopened_after_relaunch in the connected-test XML/HTML artifacts
steps.expected: A key-auth host is saved with a linked key identity, reopens in the editor with that identity, and persists across relaunch
steps.observed: The passing test covers create -> save -> reopen -> relaunch -> reopen for a key-auth host linked to the generated key identity “Deploy key”.

evidence.consoleErrors: Not applicable for Android instrumentation; the connected test run reported no failures or crash traces.
evidence.network: Not exercised for this CRUD assertion.

assertions.title: Host validation blocks incomplete or invalid connection settings

steps.action: Review the passing host validation tests in the connected-test artifacts
steps.expected: Current instrumentation should cover blank address, blank username, invalid ports, and missing credential-source permutations
steps.observed: The current suite proves invalid-port and missing-identity permutations through host_validation_blocks_invalid_port_and_missing_identity_permutations and key_auth_host_validation_requires_key_identity_before_save.

steps.action: Compare the tested permutations with the validation contract wording for VAL-HOST-004
steps.expected: The rerun suite should fully satisfy every required invalid state from the contract
steps.observed: No current instrumentation method proves actionable blank-address and blank-username validation states end to end, so the contract is still not fully satisfied by the rerun surface.

evidence.consoleErrors: Not applicable for Android instrumentation; the connected test run reported no failures or crash traces.
evidence.network: Not exercised for this CRUD assertion.

assertions.issues: Current instrumentation coverage does not yet prove the blank-address and blank-username error states required by the contract.

assertions.title: Host edits apply only after explicit save, and canceled edits leave the prior version intact

steps.action: Run the filtered app instrumentation suite on emulator-5554
steps.expected: Connected-test artifacts are regenerated from the live Android surface
steps.observed: The filtered run passed with 28/28 tests green.

steps.expected: Unsaved edits stay out of storage, cancel restores the original record, and explicit save persists the updated values across relaunch
steps.observed: The passing test asserts unchanged repository values before save, confirms cancel leaves the original host visible, then saves updated values and verifies they persist after relaunch.

evidence.consoleErrors: Not applicable for Android instrumentation; the connected test run reported no failures or crash traces.
evidence.network: Not exercised for this CRUD assertion.

assertions.title: Host deletion requires confirmation and removes only the selected host

steps.action: Run the filtered app instrumentation suite on emulator-5554
steps.expected: Connected-test artifacts are regenerated from the live Android surface
steps.observed: The filtered run passed with 28/28 tests green.

steps.expected: Deletion first offers cancel, then confirmed deletion removes only the targeted host while leaving the other host intact
steps.observed: The passing test covers cancel -> verify both hosts remain -> confirm delete -> verify only host 1 is removed, host 2 remains, and the result persists after relaunch.

evidence.consoleErrors: Not applicable for Android instrumentation; the connected test run reported no failures or crash traces.
evidence.network: Not exercised for this CRUD assertion.

assertions.title: Editing an identity preserves or updates the real credential behavior correctly

steps.action: Review the passing identity edit tests in the connected-test artifacts
steps.expected: The rerun surface should prove both metadata-only edits and secret replacement against actual connection behavior
steps.observed: The current suite proves stored-secret preservation and replacement persistence through metadata_edit_keeps_existing_password_secret and replacing_key_secret_updates_saved_public_key_and_secret_material.

steps.action: Inspect the live app navigation for the session destination after the rerun
steps.expected: A real session surface exists so edited credentials can be validated by an actual post-edit connection attempt
steps.observed: AtermNavHost still routes AppDestination.Session to SessionPlaceholder, so there is no real SSH session path available for the required user-surface authentication proof.

evidence.consoleErrors: Not applicable for Android instrumentation; the connected test run reported no failures or crash traces.
evidence.network: Blocked: no real session/network path exists because the session surface still renders SessionPlaceholder.

assertions.issues: The rerun suite still lacks a real SSH/session surface to prove changed credential behavior on the next connection attempt.

assertions.title: Keystore-protected secrets remain usable after normal app restart

steps.action: Review the relaunch-oriented identity persistence tests in the connected-test artifacts
steps.expected: The rerun surface should prove saved secrets remain usable for post-restart authentication
steps.observed: The current suite proves identity and secret persistence across relaunch at the data/UI-selection level, including saved_password_identity_remains_selectable_from_host_flows_after_relaunch.

steps.action: Inspect the live app navigation for the session destination after the rerun
steps.expected: A real session surface exists so a post-restart connection can authenticate with the saved secret
steps.observed: AtermNavHost still routes AppDestination.Session to SessionPlaceholder, so the required post-restart authentication proof cannot be exercised on the real user surface yet.

evidence.consoleErrors: Not applicable for Android instrumentation; the connected test run reported no failures or crash traces.
evidence.network: Blocked: no real session/network path exists because the session surface still renders SessionPlaceholder.

assertions.issues: The app still lacks a real post-restart authentication path, so keystore-backed secret reusability cannot be proven end to end.

frictions.description: The connected Android rerun artifacts provide XML/HTML reports but no assertion-level screenshots, so evidence for these UI assertions relies on instrumentation reports rather than captured emulator images.

blockers.description: The current host validation rerun still lacks blank-address and blank-username actionable-error coverage, so VAL-HOST-004 is not fully satisfied by instrumentation yet.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reran the latest HostLibraryFlowsInstrumentedTest suite and compared the passing test coverage with the contract language; the missing permutations are still absent.

blockers.description: The app still routes session navigation to SessionPlaceholder instead of a real SSH session surface.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Confirmed emulator readiness, reran the relevant identity instrumentation suite, and inspected AtermNavHost.kt after the rerun.

summary: Tested 6 assigned assertions on the shared atermApi35 emulator: 3 passed (VAL-HOST-003, VAL-HOST-005, VAL-HOST-006) and 3 were blocked (VAL-HOST-004, VAL-IDENTITY-008, VAL-IDENTITY-010). The remaining blockers are incomplete host-validation coverage for blank address/username and the app still routing session navigation to SessionPlaceholder instead of a real SSH surface.
